connections.name: DisplayPort 1.3 + USB 3.0
requirements: DisplayPort 1.3 (v1 cable) or USB-C to DP (v2 cable)

knownIssues.title: WMR-to-SteamVR bridge adds overhead
knownIssues.description: Running SteamVR games through the WMR runtime adds a performance penalty because the video passes through both WMR and SteamVR compositors.
knownIssues.workaround: Use OpenXR games with WMR OpenXR runtime directly (bypasses SteamVR). For SteamVR-only games, ensure both WMR and SteamVR are updated to minimize bridge overhead.

knownIssues.title: V1 cable (6m) has known reliability issues
knownIssues.description: The original Reverb G2 v1 cable is longer but more prone to signal issues and disconnects, especially with AMD GPUs.
knownIssues.workaround: HP offers a free v2 cable replacement (shorter, USB-C instead of USB-A). Contact HP support. AMD GPU users should update to latest Radeon drivers.

knownIssues.title: Controller tracking volume is limited
knownIssues.description: The G2's two-camera tracking has a narrower tracking volume than four-camera headsets. Controllers can lose tracking when behind you.
knownIssues.workaround: Keep controllers within your forward field of view. The G2 v2 revision added additional cameras for improved tracking.

optimizationTips.tip: Use OpenXR with WMR runtime for best performance
optimizationTips.simpleExplanation: Using Windows Mixed Reality directly instead of SteamVR gives you better performance with the G2.
optimizationTips.advancedExplanation: The WMR OpenXR runtime bypasses SteamVR entirely for OpenXR titles. Set WMR as the active OpenXR runtime in Windows Settings → Mixed Reality → OpenXR. This eliminates the WMR→SteamVR bridge overhead (1-2ms frame time savings).

optimizationTips.tip: The G2's high resolution rewards supersampling carefully
optimizationTips.simpleExplanation: The Reverb G2 has a very sharp screen. Setting picture quality too high will just slow things down without looking better.
optimizationTips.advancedExplanation: At 2160x2160 per eye, the G2 resolves fine detail well. SteamVR SS above 100% provides diminishing returns. For WMR-native apps, use 'Best Visual Quality' in WMR settings instead of cranking SteamVR SS. For sims (DCS, MSFS), the G2's clarity is excellent at 100% SS.
